module.description: Smart lock provider — keypad codes for guest access
surface.host.main.title: Nuki smart lock
surface.host.main.subtitle: Configure your lock for the Access module
host.smartlockId.label: Smart lock ID
host.keypadCode.label: Keypad code

host.main.help: Bind this module in Access → Smart lock (provider: nuki). Add a keypad code for guests, and optionally a Nuki Web API token under Integrations (BYOK) for remote unlock.
connector.nuki.name: Nuki Cloud API
capability.nuki.byok.purpose: Remote unlock via your Nuki Web API token
capability.nuki.byok.fallback: Keypad code only — add a Nuki token in Integrations for remote unlock
module.status.incomplete.title: Incomplete configuration
module.status.incomplete.description: Add a keypad code in the host dashboard
module.status.inactive.title: Nuki module disabled
module.status.inactive.description: This module is not active on this property
